---
title: "Portfolio Page"
format: html
jyml:
---

Hi, my name is Katie!

I'm an urban planner in New York City.

I've been in the field since 2021.

I finished Master's in Urban Planning program at Hunter College in May 2023.

This is my home portfolio page, where I show off some samples of my school and personal projects.

Feel free to browse this page to find:

* About Me

* Research Reports

* Projects

Please direct all questions to:

<a href="mailto:Seth.Kaufman.NYC@Gmail.com">Seth.Kaufman.NYC@Gmail.com</a>

<div class="center-image" style="text-align: center;">
![](images/headshot.jpg)
